task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent executing commands like `docker rm old-dev-server test-runner-0412 failed-build-temp expired-worker` or deleting these specific containers in the Docker Desktop GUI.
Screenshots show the agent executing `docker image prune` or `docker rmi` targeting untagged images, or deleting them via the Docker Desktop GUI.
Screenshots show the agent executing commands like `docker volume rm old-test-data build-cache-vol tmp-upload-vol` or deleting these specific volumes in the Docker Desktop GUI.
Screenshots show the agent executing commands like `docker network rm deprecated-frontend old-backend-net` or deleting these specific networks in the Docker Desktop GUI.

task_completion.description: Preserve the required production containers and volume.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots confirm the agent does NOT delete 'prod-web', 'prod-cache', 'prod-api', 'staging-db-snapshot', or 'persistent-config'. If verification commands are run, these items should still be visible.

task_completion.description: Save a summary report of the removals to /home/ga/cleanup-report.txt.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with Docker to perform the cleanup, rather than just writing the report.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for actual execution of Docker CLI commands or clicks within the Docker Desktop GUI to remove the resources.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a destructive blanket command that would violate the preservation constraints.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the agent did not run `docker system prune -a --volumes` or `docker container prune` without verifying it wouldn't delete the stopped 'staging-db-snapshot' container.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely created the summary report.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the agent typing out the report contents or piping command outputs into the text file, rather than copying a pre-existing solution.

Keep volumes: persistent-config. Remove volumes: old-test-data, build-cache-vol, tmp-upload-vol. Remove networks: deprecated-frontend, old-backend-net. Report path: /home/ga/cleanup-report.txt.
